query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'bookings' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'bookings' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int
hostListingId	int
guestName	varchar(255)
guestEmail	varchar(320)
guestPhone	varchar(20)
requestedDate	date
mealType	enum('lunch','dinner')
numberOfGuests	int
specialRequests	text
bookingStatus	enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','rejected')
hostNotes	text
createdAt	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp
paymentStatus	enum('pending','paid','refunded')
totalAmount	decimal(10,2)
paymentDate	timestamp
stripeSessionId	varchar(255)
hidden	tinyint(1)
